changes.description: Added import for AWS_CDN_BASE_URL from google-sheets.config
Added LOCAL_SVG_MAP property mapping floor numbers to local SVG filenames (Floor_0.svg, Floor_1.SVG, Floor_2.SVG)
Modified error handler in loadExternalSvg() to try fallback local SVG when CloudFront URL fails
Added loadSvgFromUrl() helper method for loading SVG from a specific URL with fallback logging support
Added getFallbackSvgPath() method to extract floor number from CloudFront URL and return local fallback path

result.summary: Implemented CloudFront SVG fallback mechanism. When loading SVG from CloudFront fails (due to CORS errors), the component now automatically attempts to load the equivalent bundled local SVG file from assets/cenlib-map/. The fallback extracts the floor number from the CloudFront URL and maps it to the appropriate local file (Floor_0.svg, Floor_1.SVG, or Floor_2.SVG).

Added getFallbackSvgPath() method to extract floor number from CloudFront URL and return local fallback path

value.summary: Implemented CloudFront SVG fallback mechanism. When loading SVG from CloudFront fails (due to CORS errors), the component now automatically attempts to load the equivalent bundled local SVG file from assets/cenlib-map/. The fallback extracts the floor number from the CloudFront URL and maps it to the appropriate local file (Floor_0.svg, Floor_1.SVG, or Floor_2.SVG).
